modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be distracting grammar usage and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: SmartBoard touch functionality is currently non-operational.

full_description_text: The touch feature on the SmartBoard is not functioning as expected. Users have reported that the SmartBoard has not been working properly. This issue is affecting the ability to interact with the device effectively.
short_description: SmartBoard touch functionality is currently non-operational.
description: The touch feature on the SmartBoard is not functioning as expected. Users have reported that the SmartBoard has not been working properly. This issue is affecting the ability to interact with the device effectively.
